---
title: "01 Wrangle"
output: html_notebook
---

Loads the raw UniProt Excel file, adds all derived variables, saves `../output/full_dataset.csv`.

| Column added          | Source                                     |
|-----------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| `pLLPS_class`         | High ≥ 0.7, Medium ≥ 0.4, Low \< 0.4       |
| `function_categories` | FUNCTION_CATEGORIES patterns (list column) |
| `location_categories` | LOCATION_CANONICAL patterns (list column)  |
| `TMD_count`           | Transmembrane + Intramembrane domain spans |

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
source("functions/helpers.R")

RAW <- "../Human Phase separation data.xlsx"
OUT <- "../output/full_dataset.csv"
```

```{r load}
df <- as.data.frame(read_excel(RAW))
cat(sprintf("%d proteins loaded\n", nrow(df)))
cat(sprintf("p(LLPS) range: %.2f – %.2f\n",
  min(df[["p(LLPS)"]], na.rm = TRUE),
  max(df[["p(LLPS)"]], na.rm = TRUE)))
head(df[, 1:6])
```

```{r tmd-cache}
# Merge TM annotations before enrich_df so TMD_count is computed correctly.
# The raw Excel has no Transmembrane/Intramembrane columns; they come from the cache.
tm_cache_path <- "../data/uniprot_tm_cache.csv"
if (file.exists(tm_cache_path)) {
  tm <- as.data.frame(read_csv(tm_cache_path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  df <- left_join(df, tm[, c("Entry", "Transmembrane", "Intramembrane")], by = "Entry")
  cat(sprintf("TM cache merged: %d proteins have Transmembrane annotation\n",
              sum(!is.na(df$Transmembrane) & nzchar(df$Transmembrane))))
} else {
  warning("TM cache not found at ", tm_cache_path,
          " — TMD_count will be 0. Run scripts/analysis/enrich_dataset_with_tmd.py to populate.")
}
```

```{r enrich}
# enrich_df picks up Transmembrane/Intramembrane columns if present
df <- enrich_df(df)

cat("\npLLPS class distribution:\n")
print(table(df$pLLPS_class))

n_mem <- sum(sapply(df$location_categories,
  function(x) "Plasma membrane" %in% x))
cat(sprintf("\nProteins with Plasma membrane annotation: %d (%.1f%%)\n",
  n_mem, 100 * n_mem / nrow(df)))
```

```{r top-functions}
func_counts <- sort(table(unlist(df$function_categories)), decreasing = TRUE)
cat("Top functional categories:\n")
print(head(func_counts, 10))
```

```{r save}
dir.create("../output", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Export without list columns (CSV can't store them; apps re-derive at load time)
export_cols <- setdiff(names(df), c("location_categories", "function_categories"))
write_csv(df[export_cols], OUT)
cat(sprintf("Saved %d proteins, %d columns → %s\n",
  nrow(df), length(export_cols), OUT))
```
